social_snippets.text: 🐝 Buzz into learning with our engaging bee mystery reading passage! Perfect for 6th graders practicing text evidence skills. #MiddleGradeReading #TeacherResources #ReadingComprehension

New! 6th grade reading passage: The Mystery of the Disappearing Bees 🐝 Aligned to RI.6.1 standard. Get students excited about reading while learning about important environmental issues! #TeachersOfTwitter #6thGrade

Mystery of the Disappearing Bees - 6th Grade Reading Passage | Engaging science-based reading comprehension activity aligned to Common Core RI.6.1. Perfect for teaching text evidence and inference skills! 🐝📚
